description: Trusted principal registry for spiral review-calibration (fairy_tale #43). implementer_id and reviewer_id must be a key here -- a format-valid but unregistered snowflake is rejected. Binds identity to a known principal; it does NOT prove the principal actually reviewed a specific PR (live-author binding is the remaining #43 gate). Keyed on the unforgeable Discord user_id; display names are advisory.
